variants: Qaylah Rahmani holds the Leyline Confectioner Endorsement, underlining her diverse skills in both the scientific and culinary worlds. She is a specialist in bioinformatics, where her research efforts are mainly supported by the Phoenix Basin Trust. Throughout her academic career, Qaylah received invaluable mentorship from Veselina Bakardjieva, helping to refine her expertise in this innovative field. As a proud member of the Pinehaze Falconers Society, she also engages with nature and bird conservation initiatives, demonstrating her multifaceted interests.
